[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A game lobby screen shows a central character model next to a pet and a right-side profile and battle roster panel with menus on the left.

Main Subject:
In the center, a human-like character model stands facing forward on a glowing platform, wearing a dark outfit with bright orange accents and a red-and-white mask or face covering. The character holds or is associated with a large black-and-red weapon-like item across the body. A small cartoon-like pet with a white face and blue-and-yellow beak stands near the character’s legs, with a colorful, patterned outfit on the pet. Above the character is an orange, flame-shaped decorative figure floating upward.

Setting:
The scene is indoors or within a video game interface, shown against a dark, purple-and-black background with soft spotlights and floating UI elements, giving a cinematic, futuristic lobby environment.

Visual Details:
The color palette is dominated by dark purples, blacks, and bright neon orange highlights. The central figure is sharply lit from the front, while the background is blurred with light beams and glowing particles. The character wears layered clothing with orange panels, black sections, and red accents, along with dark gloves and boots. The left side contains a vertical menu with stacked buttons, each in a dark panel style with highlighted selection at the top. The right side shows a profile card and a “BATTLE ROYALE” section with multiple item panels, each containing icons and levels marked by colored badges.

Visible Text:
Fha_nadir
Indonesia
Lv62
64291
PROFILE
FREE FIRE
BATTLE ROYALE
HEROIC EMBLEM
RUSHER
2794
552
Lv4
Lv5
No other important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image displays a Free Fire game interface with a character standing on a platform and a pet beside them. It also shows a profile panel and battle-related sections, plus a left-side menu.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
